name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: These 4 women will hold the GOP accountable
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7612/24c69fd9/3c4a488/18ec26d9/167035105/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all&source=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all")
---

| | Peter,

It's no secret that Donald Trump is a huge threat to the progress we've made over the last eight years.

But here's what gives me hope -- we just sent four incredible women to the Senate who are going to stand up to him and the rest of the Republican Party every step of the way. If there was ever a group of women that could hold the GOP accountable, this is it: | [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7612/24c69fd9/3c4a488/18ec26da/167035105/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161129_email_4senators?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all&source=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all") | | **Maggie Hassan** won her seat in New Hampshire this year, flipping a Republican seat blue. She got involved in politics after seeing her son, who has a disability, head off to public school and was reminded of all the activists who fought for him to be able to do that. Maggie spoke out against her opponent's support for Trump during the campaign and is already calling on Trump to fire Steve Bannon for promoting conspiracy theories and an extreme agenda.

---|---|---
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7612/24c69fd9/3c4a488/18ec26db/167035105/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161129_email_4senators?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all&source=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all") | | Next year, Maggie will be fighting alongside **Catherine Cortez Masto** , who won Harry Reid's seat in Nevada. She'll be the first Latina to ever serve in the Senate. And, as she said in her victory speech, she'll "be one hell of a check and balance on [Donald Trump]."

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7612/24c69fd9/3c4a488/18ec26d4/167035105/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161129_email_4senators?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all&source=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all") | | **Tammy Duckworth** is the new senator from Illinois. While serving in Operation Iraqi Freedom, Tammy's helicopter was hit with a grenade and she lost both of her legs in the explosion. So when Trump callously said this summer that he'd "always wanted" a Purple Heart, you better believe Tammy spoke out.

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7612/24c69fd9/3c4a488/18ec26d5/167035105/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161129_email_4senators?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all&source=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all") | | **Kamala Harris** is heading to D.C. from California, where she was a tough attorney general who prioritized punishing cyber exploitation, aka "revenge porn." And she's already calling out Trump's pick for U.S. attorney general (who was previously rejected by Senate Republicans in the 1980s for a judgeship because of his racist remarks) -- saying his views are "incompatible with constitutional guarantees."

These women are ready to be serious checks on Republicans in Washington, and they will fight to protect women and families from dangerous legislation.
Let's make sure we have their backs.

**Donate $3 to help send more women like Maggie, Catherine, Tammy, and Kamala to the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Elect-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7612/24c69fd9/3c4a488/18ec26d6/167035105/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161129_email_4senators?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpElectWomen&utm_campaign=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all&source=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all")**

Thank you,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7612/24c69fd9/3c4a488/18ec26d7/167035105/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161129_email_4senators?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all&source=WPEFEW38N_digital_email_20161129_4senators_n-all")

body:
We're standing up to Trump Democrats
---
**Standing up to Trump and the GOP starts right now. Pitch in $3 or more before our end-of-month deadline to help Democrats fight back:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c34a/4067b0a/225f88a30/7e0734e3/105191200/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161130_ew_nd&source=em_20161130_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Watching Trump pick his transition team and administration over the last couple of weeks has made one thing extremely clear: we're going to have one hell of a fight on our hands for the next four years.

>From white nationalist Steve Bannon as his Chief Strategist, billionaire anti-public education crusader Betsy DeVos as his Secretary of Education, birther and staunch Obamacare opponent Tom Price at Health and Human Services, and bona fide racist and voting rights opponent Jeff Sessions as his Attorney General pick, Donald Trump didn't "drain the swamp" -- he brought the worst monsters from the swamp onto his team.

We're not waiting for January 20th to start fighting back against Trump and the GOP. We're getting started right now, beginning with tonight's big monthly fundraising deadline. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to make sure that we are prepared for whatever the next four years bring us.

subject: Superhighway Threatens Rare Gorillas
body:
| | | Gorillas, elephants and other wildlife are about to lose their rainforest home to a massive superhighway - we need your help to stop it. |
---|---
| | | [](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/6/s0/r5cs/6LW3T9/7sodiMozY)
---
| [](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/s/sn/r5cs/6LW3T9/sLmVi7NfsH)
---
| | | [](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/v/sn/r5cs/6LW3T9/6xkdJXJvJe)
---
| **Gorillas, elephants and other wildlife are about to lose their rainforest home to a massive superhighway - we need your help to stop it.** [**Add your name: stop the superhighway before it 's too late!**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/z/sn/r5cs/6LW3T9/v3MTqSmqQf) |
---|---
Dear Activist,
At any minute, bulldozers could plow through one of the last rainforests in Nigeria.
As the heavy machinery tears its way through thousands of acres of lush, ancient forest, they will demolish some of the only remaining habitat of the highly endangered Cross River gorilla.
**There are just 300 Cross River gorillas left in the wild - they might not survive a blow like this.**
[**Help protect the last Cross River gorillas: sign the petition to stop destructive superhighway construction.**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/U/sn/r5cs/6LW3T9/Fzoqu02OJ)
For thousands of years, the Ekuri people have lived in and worked cooperatively to maintain this beautiful rainforest - one of the last remaining in densely populated Nigeria. But now **Cross River State Governor Ben Ayade has plans to build a massive superhighway that would destroy this precious wild place.**
Cutting through the heart of Cross River State, it would destroy a national park, adjoining forest reserves, indigenous communities, and vulnerable wildlife. What's worse, the plans call for approximately 6 miles of "buffer" on either side.
To put this in perspective, the average Nigerian interstate highway has approximately 300 feet of buffer on either side. **That means that a 12-mile swath of ancient forest, extending the entire length of the 160-mile highway - 100 times the usual area - will be bulldozed for absolutely no reason.**
Governor Ayade is pushing hard for construction to start immediately but Nigeria's federal government has the power to protect this land. [**Please, sign the petition to Nigeria 's President Buhari and help stop the Cross River State superhighway before it's too late for this precious rainforest, the Ekuri people, and wildlife like gorillas, elephants, and chimpanzees.**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/j/sn/r5cs/6LW3T9/QrtYN6I69)
I know you care about wildlife and wild places, which is why I'm writing you about this urgent crisis.
**The superhighway would annihilate the habitat of hundreds of endangered and vulnerable species, including many found nowhere else on earth.** And the livelihood of 180 indigenous communities will be completely destroyed. A powerful movement is building to stop it. The Ekuri Initiative has already organized the support of 253,000 people to take action to protect their forests - [**will you add your voice before it 's too late?**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/5/sn/r5cs/6LW3T9/zABxujjnyI)
Thank you for all that you do to protect wildlife and wild places around the world.
Sincerely,
John F. Calvelli
Executive Vice President, Public Affairs
Wildlife Conservation Society
[](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vqrIE/r/sk/r5cs/6LW3T9/sMQhOU5YaN)

name: Governor-elect Jim Justice
subject: Transition Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
WVU and Marshall Partner To Aid Transition Policy Committees

Experts from Marshall and WVU will guide policy committee meetings
Policy committees will create a resource for Governor-elect Justice

Today, the Transition Team for the Governor-elect announced that experts from West Virginia University and Marshall University will play a key role in the transition policy committees. West Virginia’s two research institutions are partnering with the Justice Transition Team to facilitate policy discussions and proposals for the new administration.

The Provost of Marshall University, Gayle L. Ormiston, Ph.D., and the Provost of WVU, Joyce McConnell, JD, LLM, will serve as co-coordinators of the Justice Transition Team. WVU and Marshall are volunteering a group of experts made up of their respective research departments and faculty members to lead discussions for each of the transition policy committees.

In conjunction with the Governor-elect’s transition team, the experts from WVU and Marshall will help run all of the policy committee meetings. Both universities have volunteered to compile findings from each committee and facilitate the presentation of recommendations to Governor-elect Jim Justice. Following the in-depth policy discussions, WVU and Marshall will be collaborating to provide additional research to the Governor-elect and his transition team.

“The Governor-elect made it clear he wants to hear from the best and brightest across West Virginia, and have our universities at the table for the policy-making process,” said Larry Puccio, chairman of the Justice Transition Team. “The goal is to hear from the leading experts to identify new opportunities to grow jobs and make West Virginia number one.”

The work of the policy committees will serve as an invaluable resource for the Justice Administration for the next four years. Further details on the policy committees will be announced shortly.

“Marshall University is pleased to be invited to assist with the transition and the formulation of policy recommendations for Governor-elect Justice,” said Jerome A. Gilbert, president of Marshall University. “Our faculty and other experts have expertise in many subject areas that are of great importance to the future of West Virginia, including infrastructure and transportation, education, and healthcare and substance abuse. We look forward to collaborating with our colleagues from WVU and others as we work to move the state ahead.”

“West Virginia University is delighted and eager to assist Governor-elect Justice as the state makes this transition,” said Gordon Gee, president of WVU. “Our universities have much to offer – from data to research to leadership. We are poised and ready to contribute in whatever ways we can to create new possibilities for West Virginia and her citizens.”

Look at what they're saying about Tom Price: ★Bernie Sanders: "Price has a long history of wanting to CUT Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid" ★Chuck Schumer: Nominating him is "like asking a fox to guard the hen house" ★Joe Donnelly: "Tom Price would put us on a direct path to END Medicare as we know it" Democrats know it's critical to protect Medicare -- and today, thousands of grassroots supporters signed our petition and did just that. All that's missing is your name! "" Senate Democrats are working fast to fight Trump's radical pick and the GOP's plot to shift crushing healthcare costs to seniors. But they need our grassroots to join them in speaking up. "" Thanks for taking a stand, Matt Kehres Digital Director, DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts. Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.
